case_title: CINGOLANI, ALBERT VS PG&E C/O LINDA CHENG, CORP. SEC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY CINGOLANI, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT PG&E C/O LINDA CHENG, CORP. SEC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO PG&E, LINDA CHENG, CORPORATION SECRETARY-RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CINGOLANI, ALBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PG&E C/O LINDA CHENG, CORP. SEC. $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,372.00, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFT, DEFT MAY REPLACE CRACKED & SCARRED SIDEWALK FLAG AREAS ADJACENT TO THE RECENTLY REPAIRED SECTIONS. DEFT SHOULD ALSO REPLACE THE FRESH AIR CAST IRON INLET COVER, WHICH WAS DESTROYED DURING THE PROJECT 20 WORK. THIS WRK MUST BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN 1/28/06. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLFT ALBERT CINGOLANI FILED ONLY.
CERT MAIL TO LINDA CHENG RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
PLTF'S 2ND EXPARTE REQUEST FOR CLARIFICATION OF JUDGMENT.
PLTF'S 2/7/06 REQUEST FOR CLARIFICATION AND/OR TO VACATE JUDGMENT.
COURT'S RESPONSE TO MR. CINGOLANI'S 2/7/06 LETTER.
MR. CINGOLANI'S 3/1/06 LETTER RE CLARIFICATION OF JUDGMENT AND OR REQUEST TO VACATE.
COURT'S RESPONSE TO MR. CINGOLANI'S LETTER OF 3/1/06.
